Manages storage and retrieval of app names using a circular cache for ANCS attributes.

# Purpose
The code provides functionality for storing and retrieving application names associated with application IDs using a circular cache. It is part of a system that manages ANCS (Apple Notification Center Service) attributes. The code defines a static cache of type `CircularCache` to store entries of type `AncsAppNameStorageEntry`, which contain pointers to `ANCSAttribute` structures for application IDs and names. The cache can hold up to 30 entries, as defined by the constant `ANCS_APP_NAME_STORAGE_SIZE`.

The code includes functions to initialize and deinitialize the storage system, as well as to store and retrieve application names. The [`ancs_app_name_storage_init`](<#ancs_app_name_storage_init>) function initializes the cache with a specified size and sets a comparator and destructor for cache items. The [`ancs_app_name_storage_store`](<#ancs_app_name_storage_store>) function copies the provided application ID and name attributes into dynamically allocated memory and stores them in the cache. The [`ancs_app_name_storage_get`](<#ancs_app_name_storage_get>) function retrieves the application name associated with a given application ID from the cache. The code uses memory management functions such as `kernel_zalloc_check` and `kernel_free` to allocate and free memory, ensuring efficient use of resources.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `ancs_app_name_storage.h`
- `string.h`
- `util/circular_cache.h`
- `kernel/pbl_malloc.h`
- `system/passert.h`


# Global Variables

---
### ANCS\_APP\_NAME\_STORAGE\_SIZE
- **Type**: ``unsigned``
- **Description**: Defines the maximum number of entries that can be stored in the ANCS app name storage cache.
- **Use**: Used to allocate memory for the circular cache that stores app name entries.


---
### s\_cache
- **Type**: ``CircularCache *``
- **Description**: A pointer to a `CircularCache` structure, initialized to `NULL`. This variable is used to manage a circular cache for storing application name entries.
- **Use**: Used to store and manage application name entries in a circular cache.


# Data Structures

---
### AncsAppNameStorageEntry
- **Type**: ``struct``
- **Members**:
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` that represents the application ID.
    - ``app_name``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` that represents the application name.
- **Description**: Stores an application ID and its corresponding application name using pointers to `ANCSAttribute` structures. This structure is used to manage and retrieve application names based on their IDs within a circular cache system.


# Functions

### prv\_comparator<!-- {{#callable:prv_comparator}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L34>)

Compares two `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` objects based on their `app_id` attributes.
- **Inputs**:
    - `a`: A pointer to the first `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` object to compare.
    - `b`: A pointer to the second `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` object to compare.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Cast `a` and `b` to `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` pointers `entry_a` and `entry_b` respectively.
    - Check if either `entry_a->app_id` or `entry_b->app_id` is `NULL`; if so, return `-1`.
    - Compare the `length` of `entry_a->app_id` and `entry_b->app_id`; if they are not equal, return `-1`.
    - Use `memcmp` to compare the `value` of `entry_a->app_id` and `entry_b->app_id` for `entry_a->app_id->length` bytes and return the result.
- **Output**: Returns `-1` if either `app_id` is `NULL` or their lengths differ; otherwise, returns the result of `memcmp` on the `app_id` values.

### prv\_destructor<!-- {{#callable:prv_destructor}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L49>)

Frees the memory allocated for `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` components.
- **Inputs**:
    - `item`: A pointer to an `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` object to be destructed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `item` is not NULL.
    - Cast `item` to `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` pointer `entry`.
    - Free the memory allocated for `entry->app_id` using `kernel_free`.
    - Free the memory allocated for `entry->app_name` using `kernel_free`.
- **Output**: No return value.

### ancs\_app\_name\_storage\_init<!-- {{#callable:ancs_app_name_storage_init}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L57>)

Initializes the application name storage cache for ANCS (Apple Notification Center Service) by allocating memory and setting up a circular cache.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Assert that the `s_cache` is not already initialized using `PBL_ASSERTN(!s_cache)`.
    - Allocate memory for `s_cache` using `kernel_zalloc_check`.
    - Allocate a buffer for storing `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` entries using `kernel_zalloc_check`.
    - Initialize the circular cache with `circular_cache_init`, passing the allocated `s_cache`, buffer, entry size, storage size, and a comparator function `prv_comparator`.
    - Set the item destructor for the cache using [`circular_cache_set_item_destructor`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_set_item_destructor>) with `prv_destructor`.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function is of type `void`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`circular_cache_set_item_destructor`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_set_item_destructor>)

### ancs\_app\_name\_storage\_deinit<!-- {{#callable:ancs_app_name_storage_deinit}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L71>)

Deinitializes the application name storage by flushing and freeing the cache.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Checks if `s_cache` is not NULL.
    - If `s_cache` is not NULL, calls [`circular_cache_flush`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_flush>) to flush the cache.
    - Frees the memory allocated for `s_cache->cache` using `kernel_free`.
    - Frees the memory allocated for `s_cache` using `kernel_free`.
    - Sets `s_cache` to NULL.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`circular_cache_flush`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_flush>)

### ancs\_app\_name\_storage\_store<!-- {{#callable:ancs_app_name_storage_store}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L80>)

Stores a copy of the application ID and name in a circular cache.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``app_id``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application ID.
    - ``app_name``: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application name.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `app_id` or `app_name` is NULL; if so, return immediately.
    - Allocate memory for a copy of `app_id` and copy its contents into the newly allocated memory.
    - Allocate memory for a copy of `app_name` and copy its contents into the newly allocated memory.
    - Create an `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` structure with the copied `app_id` and `app_name`.
    - Push the `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` structure into the circular cache `s_cache`.
- **Output**: No output is returned.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`circular_cache_push`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_push>)


---
### ancs\_app\_name\_storage\_get<!-- {{#callable:ancs_app_name_storage_get}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_app_name_storage.c#L98>)

Retrieves the application name associated with a given application ID from a circular cache.
- **Inputs**:
    - `app_id`: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application ID to search for.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Create an `AncsAppNameStorageEntry` structure with `app_id` as its `app_id` field.
    - Call [`circular_cache_get`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_get>) with the global cache `s_cache` and the created entry to search for a matching entry in the cache.
    - If a matching entry is found, return the `app_name` field of the found entry.
    - If no matching entry is found, return `NULL`.
- **Output**: A pointer to an `ANCSAttribute` structure representing the application name if found, otherwise `NULL`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`circular_cache_get`](<../../../../../libutil/circular_cache.c.md#circular_cache_get>)
